column1: How positive or negative did this trial feel?
column2: How calm or activated did you feel in this trial?
column3: How in control did you feel during this trial?
column4: What was your primary emotion during this trial?
column5: If the robot failed, which of the below corrections do you think would have helped your communication? (Pick Top 3)
column6: If the robot failed, which non-verbal behaviors would have improved your communication.

column5: Clarifying Prompt — “Sorry, I didn’t understand. Could you repeat the item?”, Guided Reset — “Let’s reset. Close all drawers and say the item again.”, Partial Understanding Repair — “I heard part of your request. Which version did you mean?”
column6: Lights highlighting the correct drawer, A quick screen cue (for example, a check mark or alert symbol) showing the robot is correcting itself., A visual reset animation such as dimming and re-brightening drawer lights, A brief pause before acting again to show the robot is recalibrating, Repeating the drawer highlight to reinforce the correction
